children.heading: Treatment as expenses
children.label: a Treatment as expenses
children.text: A taxpayer may elect to treat 50 percent of the cost of any qualified refinery property as an expense which is not chargeable to capital account. Any cost so treated shall be allowed as a deduction for the taxable year in which the qualified refinery property is placed in service.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: An election under this section for any taxable year shall be made on the taxpayer’s return of the tax imposed by this chapter for the taxable year. Such election shall be made in such manner as the Secretary may by regulations prescribe.

children.heading: Election irrevocable
children.label: 2 Election irrevocable
children.text: Any election made under this section may not be revoked except with the consent of the Secretary.

children.label: A
children.text: the original use of which commences with the taxpayer,

children.label: B
children.text: which is placed in service by the taxpayer after the date of the enactment of this section and before ,January 1, 2014

children.label: C
children.text: in the case any portion of a qualified refinery (other than a qualified refinery which is separate from any existing refinery), which meets the requirements of subsection (e),

children.label: D
children.text: which meets all applicable environmental laws in effect on the date such portion was placed in service,

children.label: E
children.text: no written binding contract for the construction of which was in effect on or before , andJune 14, 2005

children.label: i
children.text: the construction of which is subject to a written binding construction contract entered into before ,January 1, 2010

children.label: ii
children.text: which is placed in service before , orJanuary 1, 2010

children.label: iii
children.text: in the case of self-constructed property, the construction of which began after , and before .June 14, 2005January 1, 2010

children.label: A
children.text: originally placed in service after the date of the enactment of this section by a person, and

children.label: B
children.text: sold and leased back by such person within 3 months after the date such property was originally placed in service,

children.heading: Effect of waiver under Clean Air Act
children.label: 3 Effect of waiver under Clean Air Act
children.text: A waiver under the Clean Air Act shall not be taken into account in determining whether the requirements of paragraph (1)(D) are met.

children.heading: Qualified refinery
children.label: d Qualified refinery
children.text: For purposes of this section, the term “qualified refinery” means any refinery located in the United States which is designed to serve the primary purpose of processing liquid fuel from crude oil or qualified fuels (as defined in section 45K(c)), or directly from shale or tar sands.
enables the existing qualified refinery to increase total volume output (determined without regard to asphalt or lube oil) by 5 percent or more on an average daily basis, or

enables the existing qualified refinery to process shale, tar sands, or qualified fuels (as defined in section 45K(c)) at a rate which is equal to or greater than 25 percent of the total throughput of such qualified refinery on an average daily basis.
the primary purpose of which is for use as a topping plant, asphalt plant, lube oil facility, crude or product terminal, or blending facility, or
which is built solely to comply with consent decrees or projects mandated by Federal, State, or local governments.

children.heading: Election to allocate deduction to cooperative owner
children.label: g Election to allocate deduction to cooperative owner
A
children.text: a taxpayer to which subsection (a) applies is an organization to which part I of subchapter T applies, and

children.label: B
children.text: one or more persons directly holding an ownership interest in the taxpayer are organizations to which part I of subchapter T apply,

children.heading: Form and effect of election
children.label: 2 Form and effect of election
children.text: An election under paragraph (1) for any taxable year shall be made on a timely filed return for such year. Such election, once made, shall be irrevocable for such taxable year.

children.heading: Written notice to owners
children.label: 3 Written notice to owners
children.text: If any portion of the deduction available under subsection (a) is allocated to owners under paragraph (1), the cooperative shall provide any owner receiving an allocation written notice of the amount of the allocation. Such notice shall be provided before the date on which the return described in paragraph (2) is due.

children.heading: Reporting
children.label: h Reporting
children.text: No deduction shall be allowed under subsection (a) to any taxpayer for any taxable year unless such taxpayer files with the Secretary a report containing such information with respect to the operation of the refineries of the taxpayer as the Secretary shall require.
